output-exprs.el: attachments:/*attachments*/ #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_forEach"( items: pv!documents, expression: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:17ccedd3-4c03-4664-8a75-fd71ae87f3ce"( #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:17ccedd3-4c03-4664-8a75-fd71ae87f3ce/02925b99-1527-48bb-9fc8-406df81b2170": document(fv!item,"name"), #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:17ccedd3-4c03-4664-8a75-fd71ae87f3ce/79c16d9b-9cce-4e0a-81bc-962f7bfc35e2": document(fv!item,"extension"), #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:17ccedd3-4c03-4664-8a75-fd71ae87f3ce/2e5753c4-e094-4e27-b8af-32c9447ddcbf": document(fv!item,"id"), #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:17ccedd3-4c03-4664-8a75-fd71ae87f3ce/592dad6a-0a5d-4275-9009-d5a3881729a0": now(), #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:17ccedd3-4c03-4664-8a75-fd71ae87f3ce/3ce6ad16-a3f7-4bed-adc0-bb2b85503448": pp!initiator, #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:17ccedd3-4c03-4664-8a75-fd71ae87f3ce/354f153b-9e66-4694-a12f-7b254af55f30": pv!eventId ) )

eventHistory:/*Event history*/ #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb"( #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/4a99e364-d147-44c1-8f9e-3368886ea29c": pv!eventId, #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/b8a5f0fc-fd84-4032-9a72-92964a957d9c": 2, #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/0f50d3b6-39a2-48fb-81e1-64f1962c9611": pp!initiator, #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/293bc4ec-ec50-4019-bba7-81ccaaff7d5b": #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:48dcc95e-1d9c-4c07-a742-a68633d808d8" & " " & #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_forEach"(items: pv!documents,expression: document(fv!item,"name") & if(fv!isLast,"",", ")), #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/7f3aa1ca-cc5b-4d8f-ba65-5a7d59705c49": now() )

pair.value: PS ATTACHMENTS, PS EVENT EVENT HISTORY
